focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana returns home with groceries and a baby; the baby buggy suddenly vibrates as if shaken by an unseen force while Frank comments on her infant Oscar before she asks about a repair.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The baby buggy vibrates suddenly and without explanation while Dana is distracted, marking an early physical sign of supernatural activity affecting her immediate environment.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: unsettled by unexplained event
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: nature of the force affecting the buggy
evidence_quotes: DANA BARRETT comes home pushing a baby buggy, struggling with two full bags of groceries, and trying to dig her keys out of her purse.
BABY BUGGY It starts to vibrate as if shaken by an unseen hand.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 4、EXT. EAST 77TH STREET - DANA AND FRANK - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana chases a runaway buggy down the street, unable to catch it as it swerves away from helpers and heads toward a busy intersection while she sprints after it.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The baby buggy begins moving on its own, evading Dana's attempts to stop it and forcing her to chase it down a busy street.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to stop the runaway buggy and protect her child
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: in active pursuit of the runaway buggy, racing toward a dangerous intersection
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: why the buggy is moving autonomously
evidence_quotes: She reaches for the handlebar of the buggy, but the buggy rolls forward just out of her reach and stops.
Surprised by the movement, she reaches for the handlebar again, but this time the buggy rolls away even further.
Alarmed now, Dana hurries after it, but the buggy keeps rolling down the street at ever increasing speed.
Dana chases the buggy down the street, shouting to passing pedestrians for help,

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A speeding buggy enters an intersection, stops abruptly, and narrowly avoids collision with a bus; Dana rescues a baby, realizing the supernatural has returned to her life.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana rescues her baby from danger in the intersection and recognizes the return of a supernatural threat.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to save her child and understand the threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aware and vigilant
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to protect her child from the returning force
evidence_quotes: Dana runs into the intersection and snatches up the baby.
She hugs it close, deeply relieved, then looks at the buggy with the dawning awareness that the supernatural has re-entered her life.

relation_updates: reaffirms protective maternal bond
acknowledges renewed conflict with supernatural presence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Egon begins testing the girl's reaction by removing the puppy, continuing the affection experiment while Dana has already left after sharing contact details and requesting privacy.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana provides her contact information to Egon Spengler and explicitly asks him not to inform Peter Venkman about her visit, indicating her desire to maintain boundaries while seeking assistance.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to get help while avoiding personal entanglements
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: initiates formal help-seeking with conditions
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: her past relationship with Venkman remains emotionally unresolved
evidence_quotes: DANA (handing him a card) This is my address and telephone number. Will you call me?
Egon, I'd rather you didn't mention any of this to Peter if you don't mind.
I thought of calling him after my marriage ended, but --. Anyway, I appreciate you're doing this, Egon.

relation_updates: trust established with Egon Spengler
emotional distance confirmed from Peter Venkman
status_updates: Dana is now under Egon's investigative attention
auxiliary.persona_anchor: cautious求助-seeker balancing safety and history

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana notices Vigo's movement while leaving the studio, becomes frightened after catching him watching, and quickly exits.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana notices movement in Vigo's painting, realizes she is being watched, and flees the studio.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to complete work and leave safely
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: frightened and on alert
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the painting is alive and watching her
evidence_quotes: Vigo turns his head and watches Dana as she walks past the painting.
She stops, vaguely aware of the movement, and looks up curiously at the painting.
but Dana turns suddenly and catches the movement.
Frightened now, she hastily leaves the studio.

relation_updates: awareness of Vigo as an active threat
status_updates: first recognition of supernatural danger in the museum

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana adds bubble bath as the tub reacts violently, swallowing it and then closing like a mouth; she screams, snatches Oscar, and flees as the tub convulses and vomits slime.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The bathtub in Dana's apartment violently malfunctions during her attempt to bathe Oscar, reacting to the bubble bath by convulsing and closing like a mouth, forcing her to flee with the baby.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect Oscar from supernatural threats
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: traumatized and desperate
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: nowhere feels safe for her and her child
evidence_quotes: Dana reaches over and turns off the water without looking into the tub.
Still unaware, she routinely reaches over and squirts some bubble bath into the tub.
The rim of the tub puckers up and the sides convulse as if swallowing the bubble bath.

relation_updates: strengthened protective bond with Oscar

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana suggests Venkman take the sofa while she sleeps with the baby; he agrees, teases the baby, and puts him to bed, leaving Dana feeling safer in the living room.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana accepts Venkman's offer to stay the night, agrees on sleeping arrangements that keep her and Oscar together in bed, and feels more relaxed after Venkman helps put the baby down.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: find a safe place to stay with Oscar
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: more relaxed and feeling safer in Venkman's loft
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: long-term safety for her and Oscar
evidence_quotes: How about you on the sofa and me in bed with the baby.
Or we could do that.
Venkman carries the baby into the bedroom leaving Dana in the living room, feeling more relaxed and a lot safer.

relation_updates: increased reliance on Venkman
status_updates: shifts from isolation to seeking help

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana and Venkman share a romantic moment over dinner, exchanging affectionate banter; despite her hesitation, they kiss, showing a rekindling of their relationship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana and Venkman share a dinner marked by intimate conversation and a kiss, signaling a tentative reconnection after prior separation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: seek authenticity in relationship
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: openness to renewed romantic involvement
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: doubt about Venkman's reliability despite attraction
evidence_quotes: Dana and Venkman are sitting at a table in an elegant restaurant nibbling caviar and toasting with very expensive champagne.
VENKMAN (very intimate) Here's to -- us.
DANA I want to stop getting involved with men who aren't good for me.
He leans over to kiss her. DANA Maybe I should call Janine. VENKMAN Don't worry. Janine has a very special way with children. They kiss.

relation_updates: romantic relationship rekindled

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana enters, sees the empty crib and open window, screams for Louis, rushes to the window; Louis and Janine run in.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Discovers her baby is missing from the crib and the window is open, triggering immediate panic.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Find her baby
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Panicked and reactive
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Baby's whereabouts unknown
evidence_quotes: Dana enters
notices that the crib is empty and the window is open.
DANA (screams) Louis!
Dana rushes to the window and looks out

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana resolves to rescue her baby after a ghostly nanny abducts him, instructing Louis to find Peter while she takes action.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Witnesses a ghostly nanny abduct her baby and immediately resolves to get him back, directing Louis to find Peter while she takes action.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Retrieve her baby at all costs
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Committed to active rescue after witnessing the abduction
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Baby is in supernatural hands
evidence_quotes: DANA watches in helpless horror.
DANA (screams) No!!
DANA (resolutely) Louis, you have to find Peter and tell him what happened.
LOUIS (confused and worried) Where're you going?

relation_updates: Directs Louis with authority
Relies on Janine for physical support

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana refuses to let Vigo take her baby, but Janosz demonstrates Vigo's power by making Oscar float back into the cradle, revealing the spirit's growing control.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana witnesses Oscar being levitated from her arms and returned to the cradle by supernatural force, confirming Vigo's control over the physical environment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect her baby from being taken by Vigo
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: shifts from defiance to fear upon experiencing Vigo's power directly
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to protect Oscar from Vigo's possession
evidence_quotes: Dana walks quickly to the door but suddenly Oscar flies out of her arms, floats across the room and lands lightly back in the cradle.
DANA She turns and looks at Vigo, for the first time feeling his power.

relation_updates: views Vigo as a direct and powerful threat

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ghostbusters arrive, confront Janosz; Dana rescues the baby from Vigo; Venkman delivers a sarcastic 'Happy New Year'.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Dana takes immediate action to rescue Oscar from Vigo's outstretched arms while the Ghostbusters confront Janosz.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: rescue Oscar from Vigo's possession
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Dana regains physical custody of Oscar, breaking Vigo's immediate hold on him.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Oscar still bears ritual symbols, suggesting lingering supernatural risk
evidence_quotes: dashes across the studio
snatches the baby from Vigo's outstretched arms

relation_updates: defeats Vigo's physical hold on her baby

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Dana Barrett transitions from a mother experiencing subtle supernatural disturbances to an active agent resisting a malevolent ritual targeting her child. Her journey traces escalating threats—from a possessed baby buggy to a direct assault on her home and family—culminating in her decisive role in rescuing her son from Vigo's grasp. Alongside this, she re-engages with Peter Venkman, moving from emotional caution to trust and partnership. By the end, she has reclaimed agency, protected her child, and integrated into a new support network.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Elaine claims an alien at the Paramus Holiday Inn revealed the world will end on Valentine's Day 2016; Venkman skeptically jokes about alien reliability and signs off with a telepathic 'Good night.'
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: host of a psychic talk show
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman mocks apocalyptic predictions and questions the sincerity of psychic claims during his televised interview with Milton Anglund and Elaine.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: maintain entertaining, irreverent on-air persona
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: reinforces his public image as a skeptical entertainer rather than a serious investigator of psychic phenomena
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: growing tension with guests who believe in the authenticity of their psychic claims
evidence_quotes: Offended, Milton clarifies that his prediction is based on genuine psychic insight, not financial gain.

relation_updates: adversarial dynamic with Milton Anglund
status_updates: on-air host in control of talk show format

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Venkman confronts Mayor Lenny, who ignores him; assistant Hardemeyer blocks Venkman, mocks him, and leaves. Venkman threatens not to vote for Lenny due to past grievances.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: disrespected public figure confronting political power
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman is ignored by Mayor Lenny and physically blocked and mocked by aide Jack Hardemeyer, prompting Venkman to declare he will not vote for the mayor.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: seek recognition and redress for past mistreatment by city officials
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: shifts from attempting friendly contact to openly opposing the mayor due to unresolved grievances
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: past grievances over ghostbusting lawsuit remain unaddressed
evidence_quotes: The Mayor sees Venkman, blanches and hurries off, pretending not to know him.
Hardemeyer puts a heavy hand against Venkman's chest.
HARDEMEYER (scornful) I know who you are, Doctor Venkman. Busting any ghosts lately?
VENKMAN Okay, I get it. But I want you to tell Lenny that, because of you, I'm not voting for him.

relation_updates: estranged relationship with Mayor Lenny revealed
hostile interaction with Jack Hardemeyer

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Venkman pressures Stantz to reveal a name, eventually learning it's Dana Barrett, while Spengler disapproves, in a tense yet humorous moment at the bookstore.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman pressures Stantz through physical teasing until he reveals Dana Barrett's name, marking Venkman's shift from casual visitor to someone directly engaged in her case.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to find out who Stantz and Spengler are investigating
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: now personally invested in Dana Barrett's case after learning her name
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Dana's paranormal issue remains unexplained
evidence_quotes: STANTZ Aaah! Nobody! I can't tell you! VENKMAN Who, Ray? STANTZ (giving in) Dana! Dana Barrett!
Venkman lets go of his ears and smiles.

relation_updates: learns Dana Barrett is involved in a paranormal case
status_updates: shifts from detached observer to active participant in Dana's situation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana takes the specimen jar to handle the task herself while Venkman offers to supervise, indicating a shift in responsibility and involvement.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: commits to involvement in the case
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman offers to supervise Dana as she handles the specimen, marking his shift from detached skepticism to active participation in the investigation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to assess the baby's condition despite lack of experience
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: now involved in the practical aspects of the paranormal assessment
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the baby's potential supernatural nature remains unclear
evidence_quotes: Unusual?
I don't know. I haven't had a lot of experience with babies.
I'll do it.
I'll supervise.

relation_updates: shifts from antagonistic to cooperative dynamic with Dana
status_updates: takes informal responsibility for the investigation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Venkman and Stantz secretly investigate a ghost case despite a legal ban, with Venkman excited about the potential fame and Stantz urging caution to avoid trouble.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman shows enthusiasm for pursuing a high-profile case despite a court-ordered ban on ghostbusting, downplaying the risks when Stantz expresses concern.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: pursue high-profile ghost investigation despite legal ban
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: team proceeds with unauthorized investigation
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: legal consequences of violating restraining order
evidence_quotes: VENKMAN I love this. We're onto something really big. I can smell it, Ray. We're going to make some headlines with this one.
VENKMAN Relax. We're going to keep this whole thing nice and quiet, low key, no profile.

relation_updates: clashes with Stantz over risk tolerance
asserts leadership in defiance of authority
status_updates: actively defies judicial restriction on ghostbusting

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Venkman explains under oath that he and his team handle unexplained supernatural phenomena, joking about the hole they dug, which prompts laughter and a warning from the judge before the prosecutor continues questioning.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: defendant and public spokesperson for the Ghostbusters during trial
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman testifies under oath that the Ghostbusters handle unexplained phenomena beyond normal understanding, framing their work as necessary despite public skepticism.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: justify the team's actions and defend their role in the incident
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Venkman publicly asserts the team's purpose as dealing with the supernatural, though the court remains skeptical and maintains legal pressure
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the court does not accept the supernatural explanation, leaving the team at risk of conviction
evidence_quotes: No, I guess I'm just saying that shit happens and somebody has to deal with it.
Seventy-seventh and First Avenue has so many holes already we didn't think anyone would notice.
Sorry, your Honor, but when somebody sets me up like that I can't resist.

relation_updates: Judge: becomes openly hostile
Prosecutor: escalates adversarial stance
status_updates: officially on trial as a defendant

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The judge condemns the Ghostbusters as charlatans, expressing desire for harsher punishment, while supernatural activity escalates in the courtroom as the slime in the jar pulses, prompting the team to take cover.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman and the Ghostbusters are found guilty and sentenced, but supernatural activity in the courtroom immediately challenges the court's judgment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive legal system and prepare for supernatural threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: legally convicted and sentenced to prison, but emerging supernatural phenomena begin to validate their claims
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: facing incarceration while a growing supernatural threat demands immediate action
evidence_quotes: You're beneath the contempt of this court.
STANTZ Under the table, boys!

relation_updates: Judge: declares Venkman beneath contempt
Louis Tully: shows fear but remains loyal
status_updates: sentenced to 18 months at Ryker's Island

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Ghostbusters retrieve their equipment, confront the Scoleri Brothers, and successfully trap the vengeful ghosts using coordinated proton streams and tactical maneuvers in the damaged courtroom.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman draws the Scoleri Brothers' attention and directs team movement to corner the ghosts using proton streams and traps.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: neutralize the ghost threat using coordinated proton streams
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Scoleri Brothers are contained in ghost traps
evidence_quotes: VENKMAN Hey! Why don't you pick on someone your own size?
VENKMAN Spengs, take the door. Ray, let's try and work them down and into the corner.

relation_updates: asserts leadership over Stantz and Spengler in the field
establishes adversarial stance toward the Scoleri Brothers
status_updates: actively engaged in ghost capture operation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Dana suggests Venkman take the sofa while she sleeps with the baby; he agrees, teases the baby, and puts him to bed, leaving Dana feeling safer in the living room.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: responding to crisis with care and responsibility
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman responds to Dana's emergency by offering shelter, tending to Oscar's immediate needs, and arranging for the team to investigate the threat, showing a shift toward practical caretaking.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect Dana and investigate the threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: actively involved in Dana's safety and domestic well-being
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Dana's supernatural experiences remain unexplained
evidence_quotes: starts tying it around him like a diaper.
You might as well make yourself at home. Let me show you around.

relation_updates: deepens connection with Dana
demonstrates caretaking role toward Oscar

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: After Hardemeyer is sucked into the slime, the Mayor believes Venkman and asks what he needs to stop the supernatural threat by midnight.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After Hardemeyer is discredited by being pulled into the slime, the Mayor accepts Venkman as the credible authority on the supernatural threat.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Stop the supernatural threat by midnight and rescue Dana and her child.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Venkman is acknowledged by the Mayor as the person in charge of handling the crisis at the museum.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The team still lacks resources and time to execute their plan.
evidence_quotes: MAYOR (to Venkman) Okay, just tell me what you need.

relation_updates: shift in power with the Mayor: from dismissed to trusted advisor
final breakdown of relationship with Hardemeyer
status_updates: recognized as legitimate crisis responder by city leadership

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Statue of Liberty activates and begins to move as the Ghostbusters, using a game controller and microphone, initiate her motion with full power confirmed by Spengler's readings.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman issues the command to activate the Statue of Liberty's movement, directing the team's effort through verbal instruction.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: successfully activate and control the Statue of Liberty to transport the entity
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: the Statue of Liberty begins moving under the team's control
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: potential risks of large-scale movement not yet addressed
evidence_quotes: VENKMAN (into a microphone) Okay, Libby. Let's get it in gear.

relation_updates: reinforces leadership role within the team
status_updates: assumes operational control during critical phase

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Mayor reluctantly agrees to pay Ghostbusters' bill after Venkman and Stantz argue the Statue's new location is convenient, but Spengler refuses checks, insisting on cash.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Venkman pressures the Mayor to pay by implying the Statue of Liberty could remain in Central Park, using humor and situational leverage to advance the financial demand.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: secure full payment for Ghostbusters' services
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mayor agrees to pay the bill, though Spengler's cash-only policy leaves final payment unresolved in this scene
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: method of payment remains unsettled as checks are refused and cash has not yet been delivered
evidence_quotes: This probably isn't a good time to bring this up, but the last time we did a job for the city you stiffed us.
I think she looks pretty good here, don't you?
Yeah, and a lot easier to get to than that island.

relation_updates: maintains adversarial but functional dynamic with city authority
status_updates: reinforces Ghostbusters' legitimacy as a business demanding accountability

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Peter Venkman evolves from a cynical, skeptical TV host into a committed leader of the Ghostbusters, balancing irreverent humor with growing emotional and professional responsibility. His journey traces a shift from self-interest to team leadership, marked by deepening personal investment in Dana Barrett and a pivotal role in confronting supernatural threats. Despite maintaining his trademark wit, Venkman gradually embraces accountability, culminating in his recognition as a legitimate crisis responder and romantic partner. The arc reflects a transformation from detached performer to integrated hero within both the team and the city’s survival.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ghostbusters face hostility at a children's party; a boy mocks them, Stantz threatens him, and they attempt to rally kids with their theme song, but kids chant for He-Man instead.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray Stantz becomes visibly upset and confrontational when a child mocks the Ghostbusters' credibility, exposing his sensitivity to public rejection.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: gain cooperation and respect from children at party
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: defensive and strained
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: public perception of Ghostbusters as ineffective
evidence_quotes: KIDS (disappointed) Ghostbusters!! Boooo!!
BOY My dad says you're full of crap.
STANTZ (stopped cold) Well, a lot of people have trouble believing in the paranormal.
Stantz grabs him by the shirtfront. STANTZ (low and menacing) I'm watching you.

relation_updates: adversarial interaction with a child
solidarity with Winston under pressure
auxiliary.persona_anchor: emotionally invested in team's public image

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Stantz and Winston argue about quitting ghostbusting after a tough job, with Winston frustrated by mistreatment at parties, while Stantz urges him to stay for the busy holiday season.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray persuades Winston to continue ghostbusting by pointing to the upcoming holiday season as a critical time for business.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: keep the Ghostbusters operational
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Winston stays with the team for the time being
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Winston's frustration with being mistreated at parties remains unresolved
evidence_quotes: WINSTON That's it, Ray. I've had it. No more parties. I'm tired of taking abuse from over-privileged nine-year-olds.
STANTZ Come on, Winston. We can't quit now. The holidays are coming up. It's our best season.

relation_updates: reinforces commitment to Winston Zeddemore

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Giga-meter detects high psychomagnetheric energy under the street where the buggy stopped; Dana worries about her vulnerability to supernatural events, which Venkman dismisses as coincidence.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray Stantz helps deploy the Giga-meter on East 77th Street, detecting a strong subsurface psychomagnetheric energy signal after an initial PKE meter reading came back negative.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: locating source of paranormal disturbance
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: confirms elevated psychomagnetheric energy levels beneath the street, indicating a significant paranormal presence
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: nature and origin of the subsurface energy remain unidentified
evidence_quotes: STANTZ (reading the PKE meter) Is this the spot?
Stantz reads the PKE meter. STANTZ Nothing. Not a trace.
STANTZ Egon and I have been working on a gauge to measure psychomagnetheric energy in GEVs - giga electron volts.
STANTZ I think we hit the honeypot, boys. There's something brewing under the street.

relation_updates: shared scientific authority with Spengler
skeptical stance toward Venkman's coincidence claim
status_updates: uses advanced equipment in field test
identifies significant energy buildup beneath street

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 30、INT. VAN HORNE STATION - STANTZ'S POV - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Stantz discovers the preserved Van Horne Station with Art Nouveau mosaics, confirming the existence of the old New York Pneumatic line.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray descends into a deep airshaft and finds the intact Van Horne Station, confirming the existence of the old New York Pneumatic line.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: verify the location and significance of the underground structure
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: first to observe and confirm the preserved station's existence
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: connection between the station and paranormal activity
evidence_quotes: He pans the walls with his flashlight, admiring the excellent tilework
This is it, boys, the end of the line. Van Horne Station. The old New York Pneumatic. It's still here.

relation_updates: shares discovery with Venkman and Spengler
status_updates: confirms key historical and paranormal site

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Stantz, attacked by sentient slime with grasping arms, urgently calls Venkman to pull him up as the slime reacts violently to his presence.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray is attacked by sentient slime while collecting a sample, prompting an urgent call for extraction as the entity demonstrates hostile, reactive behavior.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: collect sample and survive encounter
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: in immediate physical danger, suspended above the slime and calling for emergency extraction
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the slime's sentience and capacity for aggression
evidence_quotes: He dangles from the end of the cable, holding his feet up as high as he can.
Reaching down, he scoops up a sample of the slime and starts retracting the pole.
Suddenly, a grotesque arm with long skeletal fingers reaches up out of the slime and snatches at Stantz's dangling feet.
STANTZ (on the radio) Haul me up, Venkman! Now!

relation_updates: relies on Venkman for rescue

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The streetlights and buildings on East 77th go dark, followed by a citywide blackout, with Stantz apologizing off-screen.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray's actions lead to a citywide blackout, followed by his audible off-screen apology, signaling recognition of responsibility.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: citywide blackout initiated, systems fail across Manhattan
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: consequences of the blackout remain unaddressed
evidence_quotes: STANTZ (O.S.) Sorry.

relation_updates: public impact acknowledged
auxiliary.persona_anchor: acknowledges fault despite lack of intent

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Ghostbusters retrieve their equipment, confront the Scoleri Brothers, and successfully trap the vengeful ghosts using coordinated proton streams and tactical maneuvers in the damaged courtroom.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray directs the team's movements and trap deployment during the confrontation with the Scoleri Brothers, ensuring coordinated fire and successful containment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to contain the Scoleri Brothers and protect the Judge
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: the Ghostbusters successfully trap the Scoleri Brothers and demonstrate operational readiness
evidence_quotes: STANTZ Let's go to work, boys.
STANTZ (to the others) On my signal, boys. Open 'em up -- Now!
STANTZ Steady -- watch your streams -- easy now -- Venky, bring him left -- Spengy, pull him down -- trapping -- trapping -- now!
He stomps on a control pedal and the Scoleri Brothers are drawn into the traps which snap shut.

relation_updates: asserts leadership within the team
reinforces trust with Spengler and Venkman
status_updates: regains authority to use Ghostbusting equipment

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Stantz drives erratically, ignoring warnings, and swerves off the road while threatening to kill everyone, alarming Winston.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray drives erratically, ignores warnings, and explicitly threatens to kill everyone before swerving off the road, indicating a sudden shift to hostile behavior likely due to external influence.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: appears to intend to kill the team, contradicting his prior cooperative role
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: poses an immediate physical threat to the team through dangerous driving and verbal threats
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the cause of Ray's sudden behavioral change is not yet identified
evidence_quotes: Stantz continues his maniacal ride.
Stantz looks at him and smile demonically.
STANTZ No, I'm going to kill everybody!
He swerves off the road.

relation_updates: relationship with Winston becomes adversarial and threatening

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Spengler forces Winston and Stantz to remove slime-covered clothes, revealing the slime's corrupting effect; they realize it's pure evil flowing toward the museum.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After experiencing uncharacteristic aggression while covered in slime, Ray recognizes the substance is inducing violent behavior and identifies it as 'pure, concentrated evil,' regaining mental clarity once decontaminated.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understand the slime's effect
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aware that the slime has a malevolent, corrupting influence
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the slime is moving with purpose toward the museum
evidence_quotes: They are exhausted and covered with slime.
WINSTON (uncharacteristically angry) Nice going, Ray! What were you trying to do -- drown me?
STANTZ (unusually mean) Look, Zeddemore, it wasn't my fault you were too stupid to drop that line.
STANTZ Don't you see? It's the slime. That stuff is like pure, concentrated evil.

relation_updates: temporary hostility with Winston and Spengler
renewed trust after shared realization
auxiliary.persona_anchor: perceptive and resilient after exposure to trauma

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Statue of Liberty activates and begins to move as the Ghostbusters, using a game controller and microphone, initiate her motion with full power confirmed by Spengler's readings.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray Stantz uses a video game controller to operate the Statue of Liberty's movement during the paranormal intervention.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: initiate and control the Statue of Liberty's motion to transport the entity
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: actively piloting the Statue of Liberty using a game controller
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: risk of losing control due to the improvised control system
evidence_quotes: STANTZ She's moving!
Stantz picks up a Nintendo control paddle from a home video game and starts pushing the buttons.

relation_updates: coordinates with Venkman and Spengler under pressure
status_updates: in control of a large-scale paranormal operation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Janosz is restored to normal after a psychic episode and offered coffee. The group examines a hidden painting from the Late Renaissance, with Winston finding it familiar.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Ray recovers after being covered in slime and regains consciousness, expressing affection for the team.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: stop Vigo from escaping the painting
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: physically stable but covered in slime, recently revived
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: physical and psychological aftermath of near-death experience
evidence_quotes: Venkman, Spengler and Winston rush over to Ray and kneel beside him.
SPENGLER (examining him) He's breathing.
Winston wipes the slime off Ray's face and Ray opens his eyes.
STANTZ (smiles lovingly) Groovy. I've never felt better in my life.

relation_updates: reinforces trust with team under life-threatening pressure
status_updates: physically endangered, used as human shield

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ray Stantz evolves from a publicly mocked and emotionally strained ghostbusting pioneer to a resilient leader facing supernatural and institutional challenges. His journey includes defending the team's legacy, enduring personal psychological threats from Vigo, and ultimately spearheading the spiritual and technical strategy that saves New York. Through crisis, betrayal, and near-collapse, Stantz maintains emotional investment in the team's mission, culminating in a triumphant, symbolically resonant victory.
